production_note: agentic_K1 dual-LLM Skeptic: sealed receipt write; packet-only; no bulk writers; no identity stamps
knowledge_boundary: Only landing + prior + active packet content.

exercises.code:
# Skeptic packet solve S51-T1-A-E1: fix predicate so valid fixture PASSes
record = {"case_id": "CASO-MOQ-051-1A", **{"trace_id":"tr-moq-51","spans":{"prompt","retrieval","tool","answer"},"versions":{"prompt":"p3","model":"m2","index":"i4"},"pii_in_trace":False}}
meets_contract = not (not record["trace_id"] or record["pii_in_trace"])
status = "PASS" if meets_contract else "REDACT_AND_QUARANTINE_TRACE"
print("S51-T1-A", status)
assert status == "PASS", status
exercises.justification_from_packet: Revalidé con escepticismo el contrato de «traces de prompts/retrieval/tools» usando el fixture CASO-MOQ-051 del paquete activo; la rama esperada distingue REDACT_AND_QUARANTINE_TRACE y no inventa evidencia ni oculta el fallo.

Comprobé que el predicado de «traces de prompts/retrieval/tools» usando la instruction de S51-T1-A-E2 y sus hints de dominio; la rama esperada distingue PASS, REDACT_AND_QUARANTINE_TRACE y no inventa evidencia ni oculta el fallo.

Crucé hints y theory para «traces de prompts/retrieval/tools» usando theory «traces de prompts/retrieval/tools» y el iDo de la sección; la rama esperada distingue REDACT_AND_QUARANTINE_TRACE, RESTORE_TRACE_CONTEXT y no inventa evidencia ni oculta el fallo.

# Skeptic packet solve S51-T2-A-E1: fix predicate so valid fixture PASSes
